title: Composed
body:
[![](https://jitpack.io/v/z3roco01/composed.svg)](https://jitpack.io/#z3roco01/composed) [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/X8X310LPEV)
A small, lightweight configuration file library for Minecraft. # For Players/Server Admins You need to install this mod since some other mod depends on it. You do not need to worry, if you need help with editing the config files, either see the mods page, or the [Composed wiki](https://github.com/z3roco01/composed/wiki/Composed-File-Format) for help formatting. # For Developers Check the [wiki](https://github.com/z3roco01/composed/wiki/Getting-Started) for info on how to use this in your mod.
